[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017
[TITLE]: New Eric Trump Foundation Filings Reveal Dramatic Overhaul Of Board
[METADATA/INTRO]: The Eric Trump Foundation recently overhauled its board of directors, according to documents filed with the state of New York Wednesday, which also confirm that the charity has changed its name to Curetivity. The president’s son Eric is no longer...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Originally founded by a group of friends in 2007, leadership inside the Eric Trump Foundation began to change around 2010, when four of the original seven directors dropped off of the list of board members, and three people who worked for the future U.S. president joined the board. The next year the nonprofit Eric Trump Foundation began paying the for-profit Trump Organization for using its golf club, according former club employee Ian Gillule and former Eric Trump Foundation board member Katrina Kaupp. Donald Trump insisted on the payment, both sources said. Still, years later, Eric Trump continued to falsely claim that his charitable organization got to use his family’s assets “100% free of charge.”

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2025-01-20
[TITLE]: Donald Trump's kids and grandkids get all dolled up for inauguration weekend
[METADATA/INTRO]: Ivanka, Tiffany, Kai and more of Donald Trump’s kids and grandkids get all dolled up for inauguration weekend See more of our coverage in your search results....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The teen and her brothers matched in pajamas that evening as their parents donned formalwear for a candlelit dinner party. 
 Ivanka, notably, wore a custom gown by the fashion house — which led many liberal social media users to call for a boycott. 
 Want more celebrity and pop culture news? 
 Start your day with Page Six Daily. 
 Thanks for signing up! 
 Her pregnant sister, Tiffany Trump, covered her baby bump in a tan coat earlier that same day while posing with husband Michael Boulos. 
 The siblings also coordinated in all-black outfits — along with brothers Donald Trump Jr. and Eric Trump — after arriving in Washington, DC, on Saturday for the President’s Reception.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2024
[TITLE]: Who is Ivanka Trump? What to know as family re-enters the White House
[METADATA/INTRO]: Who is Ivanka Trump? What to know about Donald Trump's oldest daughter and former adviser - Ivanka Trump announced in 2022 that she and Kushner would not be involved in politics and would instead prioritize their family....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: "She was a wonderful, beautiful, and amazing woman, who led a great and inspirational life," Donald Trump wrote when sharing the news of the death of his former spouse on Truth Social that year. "Her pride and joy were her three children, Donald Jr., Ivanka, and Eric. She was so proud of them, as we were all so proud of her." 
 Ivanka has two siblings − Donald Trump Jr., 46, Eric Trump, 40 − and two half-siblings Tiffany Trump, 31, and Barron Trump, 18. 
 Before Ivanka joined the White House as a senior advisor, the Wharton graduate served as an executive vice-president at the Trump Organization until January 2017 and had several entrepreneurial ventures of her own, including an eponymous fashion label she founded in 2014 and shut down in 2018.
